args.query: SELECT Id, TRIM(FirstName) AS FirstName, TRIM(AccountId) AS AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' OR Id = '#003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, TRIM(FirstName) AS FirstName, TRIM(AccountId) AS AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' OR Id = '#003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id, TRIM(Quantity) AS Quantity, TRIM(UnitPrice) AS UnitPrice FROM OrderItem WHERE OrderId IN (SELECT Id FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' OR AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id, TRIM(Quantity) AS Quantity, TRIM(UnitPrice) AS UnitPrice FROM OrderItem WHERE OrderId IN (SELECT Id FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' OR AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, TRIM(EffectiveDate) AS EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' OR AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' LIMIT 50;

args.query: SELECT OI.Id AS OrderItemId, OI.OrderId, OI.Product2Id, OI.Quantity, OI.UnitPrice, TRIM(P.Name) AS ProductName, P.Id AS ProductId FROM OrderItem OI JOIN Product2 P ON REPLACE( P.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE( OI.Product2Id, '#', '') WHERE OI.OrderId IN ('801Wt00000PHRYWIA5','801Wt00000PGXwDIAX') LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql: SELECT OI.Id AS OrderItemId, OI.OrderId, OI.Product2Id, OI.Quantity, OI.UnitPrice, TRIM(P.Name) AS ProductName, P.Id AS ProductId FROM OrderItem OI JOIN Product2 P ON REPLACE( P.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE( OI.Product2Id, '#', '') WHERE OI.OrderId IN ('801Wt00000PHRYWIA5','801Wt00000PGXwDIAX') LIMIT 200;
